Untitled UI
Components Templates Docs
Copy code
pattern library

empty state gallery

twelve patterns for when there's nothing to show yet. each pairs a hand-drawn 120×120 illustration with a headline, description, and primary action.

first-run

no projects yet

get started by creating your first project. you can always rename or archive it later.

import create project
zero-search

no results for "prism"

we couldn't find anything matching your search. try a shorter query or different keywords.

clear filters reset search
celebratory

inbox is clear

you're caught up. take a breath. new items will appear as teammates assign them.

invite-needed

no teammates yet

invite people to collaborate on this workspace. they'll see projects you share with them.

invite teammates
optional

no favourites yet

star items to keep them handy. starred items appear here across every project.

first-run

no messages

reach out to your first contact to start a thread. all conversations land here.

new message
dropzone

no files uploaded

drag and drop files here, or pick from your device. max 100mb per file.

browse files upload
calendar

nothing scheduled

create your first event to see it on the calendar. invites sync both ways.

add event
activity

no activity

when teammates make changes, you'll see them here. notifications turn on automatically.

access

permission denied

you don't have access to this resource. ask a workspace admin to grant access.

request access
celebratory

break time

you've cleared every task for today. grab a coffee — new work will roll in on schedule.

engagement

no comments yet

be the first to leave a comment on this thread. threaded replies and reactions are supported.

start the conversation

inline variants

for use inside tables, lists, and panels where a full card is too heavy.

no results in this view

try removing a filter or expanding the date range.

reset

no integrations connected

connect figma, slack, or github to see data here.

connect

writing copy that earns its keep

the three rules we use internally for every empty-state headline and description.

rule 1

name the absence

"no projects yet" not "welcome!". the user needs to know what's missing before they can decide what to do.

rule 2

suggest one next step

one primary action. a secondary if there's a good default. never three.

rule 3

no encouragement language

no "let's get started!", no "you got this!". plain voice, short sentences, zero exclamation marks.

Untitled UI Pro — empty state gallery template
